description_long: This object is a slender, straight-bladed sword with a metallic silver blade and a gold-colored crossguard. The handle is black with a ribbed texture for grip, capped at both ends with gold-colored fittings, including a rounded pommel. The crossguard is simple and slightly curved, also gold in color, providing hand protection. The blade is long, narrow, and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting. The overall design is elegant and functional, with minimal ornamentation aside from the gold accents. The materials and proportions suggest it is a decorative or ceremonial short sword, but it could also serve as a functional weapon.
description: A straight, silver-bladed sword with a gold crossguard and pommel, and a ribbed black handle. The design is elegant, with gold accents and a pointed blade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight silver blade, gold crossguard, and ribbed black handle with gold pommel.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow blade edge and the rounded gold pommel at the end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle's end and the thin profile of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: ribbed black handle, straight, gold pommel and guard, ergonomic grip
